arabic: يُعَدُّ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُكْلَةَ الشَّعْبِيَّةَ الْأَكْثَرَ شُهْرَةً فِي بَعْضِ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ. يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ. يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِهِ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ. يُوضَعُ خُبْزُ الشِّرَاكِ تَحْتَ الْأُرْزِ لِيَمْتَصَّ النَّكْهَةَ اللَّذِيذَةَ. يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةَ لِأَنَّهَا تَرْمِزُ إِلَى الْكَرَمِ.
translation: Mansaf je najpoznatije tradicionalno jelo u nekim arapskim zemljama. Ovo jelo se sastoji od mesa, riže i jameed jogurta. Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze kako bi ga jeli u posebnim prilikama. Šrak hljeb se stavlja ispod riže kako bi upio ukusan miris. Ljudi vole ovaj obrok jer simbolizira velikodušnost.
translationEn: Mansaf is the most famous traditional dish in some Arab countries. This dish consists of meat, rice, and jameed yogurt. Family members gather around one table to eat it on special occasions. Shrak bread is placed under the rice to absorb the delicious flavor. People love this meal because it symbolizes generosity.
